sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ وَسَلَّمَ عَلَى النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao u džamiju i pozdravio ljude.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad went to the mosque and greeted the people.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَدَّ عَلَيْهِ الْجَمِيعُ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Es-selamu alejkum i svi su mu uzvratili.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Peace be upon you and everyone responded.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ وَتَحَدَّثُوا قَبْلَ الصَّلَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Sjeo je s prijateljima i razgovarali su prije namaza.
sentences.translationEn: He sat with his friends and they talked before the prayer.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ: الْمَسْجِدُ بَيْتُ اللَّهِ وَبَيْتُنَا أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Kaže: Džamija je Allahova kuća i naša kuća također.
sentences.translationEn: He says: The mosque is God's house and our house too.
